{{ letter_head }}
{% endif %}

{{ doc.company }}

{{ _("Date") }}: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date) }}

{% endif %}

{{ doc.seminary_summary }}

{{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer }}

{{ _("Student") }}
{{ student_name or doc.custom_student }}
{{ doc.custom_student }}
{% endif %}
{% for item in doc.items %} {% endfor %}
{{ _("Description") }} {{ _("Qty") }} {{ _("Rate") }} {{ _("Amount") }}
{{ item.description or item.item_name }} {{ item.qty }} {{ item.uom or '' }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(item.rate, currency=doc.currency) }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(item.amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% if doc.discount_amount %} {% endif %} {% if doc.outstanding_amount and doc.outstanding_amount != doc.grand_total %} {% endif %}
{{ _("Subtotal") }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.net_total, currency=doc.currency) }}
{{ _("Discount") }}-{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.discount_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
{{ _("Total") }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.grand_total, currency=doc.currency) }}
{{ _("Outstanding") }}{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.outstanding_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% if doc.payment_schedule %}

{{ _("Payment Schedule") }}

{% for ps in doc.payment_schedule %} {% endfor %}
{{ _("Due Date") }}{{ _("Description") }}{{ _("Amount") }}
{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(ps.due_date) }} {{ ps.description or ps.payment_term or '' }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(ps.payment_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% endif %}
{{ _("Thank you.") }}
